description: Reviewed executable service-control actions. Canonical registry data stores only stable control identities and wrapper references; machine-local runtime details stay outside this file.

entries.inputContract: No user-supplied runtime arguments. Action runs the reviewed DevGov doctor command against the current repo and summarizes the result.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the reported registry or dashboard health errors before changing runtime state.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the unified DevGov dashboard and its public aliases.

entries.inputContract: No user-supplied runtime arguments. Action performs bounded local ensure-running behavior for the DevGov dashboard origin only.
entries.rollbackNotes: If the action fails, inspect reports/service-control-events.json and rerun the reviewed local dashboard start path manually.
entries.notes: This first approved action is intentionally bounded to local DevGov dashboard ensure-running semantics on the non-public control listener.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the external tunnel-client runtime doctor wrapper and summarize the outcome.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the external openai-mcp-tunnel runtime scripts and readyz listener.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the tunnel-client local filesystem MCP bridge.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the external tunnel-client runtime repair wrapper and summarize the outcome.
entries.rollbackNotes: Use the openai-mcp-tunnel runtime scripts directly if DevGov control is unavailable. Runtime process restarts remain loopback-only.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running restart action for the tunnel-client local filesystem MCP bridge.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Inspect the installed Windows service state, token file, and authenticated /health result for the Local Archive Maintainer app-server.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is diagnostic only. If it fails, inspect the service home logs and service-local state before forcing a reinstall.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the installed Local Archive Maintainer Windows service.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Restart the installed WinSW service and wait for the authenticated /health endpoint to recover.
entries.rollbackNotes: If restart does not restore health, inspect the service home logs and consider reinstall or state repair outside DevGov.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only restart action for the installed Local Archive Maintainer Windows service using the native service controller plus authenticated health recovery.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the PS3 Eye virtual camera doctor in read-only mode and summarize failed checks.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the target repo doctor output before attempting repair.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for PS3 Eye virtual camera observation.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the reviewed PS3 Eye repair/start sequence and then re-run doctor checks.
entries.rollbackNotes: If repair does not restore the camera pipeline, inspect ffmpeg, VCamSample, and hardware state directly on the target repo.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only repair action for PS3 Eye virtual camera observation.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the Taste runtime check for local and public endpoint reachability.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the Taste runtime check output and the public route state before attempting repair.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the Taste Next.js runtime and Cloudflare route.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Ensure the local Taste runtime is listening on 127.0.0.1:3010, then rerun the full runtime check.
entries.rollbackNotes: If restart restores the local app but public checks still fail, inspect the cloudflared service and route health separately.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for the Taste Next.js runtime; public route failures remain visible after local start.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Check the local runtime health on 127.0.0.1:4321, the runtime status script, and the public staging health endpoint together.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If local health passes but public health fails, reconcile the Cloudflare route target before attempting further repair.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the Codex Calendar Todo staging runtime and public route.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Ensure the local Codex Calendar Todo runtime is healthy on 127.0.0.1:4321, then recheck the public staging route.
entries.rollbackNotes: If local health recovers but public health still fails, update the reviewed Cloudflare route target before treating staging as restored.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for Codex Calendar Todo staging; any remaining public-route or Access failure stays visible after local recovery.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the SBS proxy doctor to validate defaults, governed port, launcher registration, and proxy health.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the SBS proxy doctor output and local proxy health before attempting auto-start.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the SBS local proxy.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the SBS proxy doctor in start mode so the protocol launcher and governed port path can ensure the proxy is healthy.
entries.rollbackNotes: If ensure-running fails, inspect the SBS protocol launcher, local proxy health, and local-artifacts logs inside the target repo.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for the SBS local proxy.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Validate the governed port registration, Python server syntax, and the live ShaderGlass bridge health endpoint.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the local preview server status and the target repo bridge docs before attempting ensure-running.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the color-management-Shader Display Shader Control Lab.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Ensure the Display Shader Control Lab Python bridge is listening on the governed loopback port without opening a browser window.
entries.rollbackNotes: If ensure-running fails, inspect the preview server logs and the governed port state before retrying.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for the color-management-Shader Display Shader Control Lab.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Validate the governed Vite port, then run the existing lint and test scripts from the root url-hero worktree.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the root url-hero worktree test output before attempting to restart the dev server.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the root url-hero Vite dev app without mutating the dirty target repo.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Ensure the root url-hero Vite dev server is listening on 127.0.0.1:3100 with strictPort and HMR disabled for background stability.
entries.rollbackNotes: If ensure-running fails, inspect the url-hero dev server logs and the existing dirty target repo before changing any project code.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for the root url-hero Vite dev app without editing the pre-existing dirty worktree.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Use the existing codex-remote runtime status scripts and confirm local/public healthz and readyz endpoints.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If public checks fail while local checks pass, inspect the codex-remote tunnel status separately.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the codex-remote runtime authority under Documents/Codex.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the reviewed codex-remote on-login bootstrap and confirm local/public healthz and readyz endpoints recover.
entries.rollbackNotes: If local healthz and readyz recover but public checks fail, inspect the codex-remote tunnel logs before treating the route as restored.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for the codex-remote runtime authority under Documents/Codex.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Check LM Studio server status plus local/public OpenAI-compatible /v1/models reachability.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect LM Studio CLI server status, server logs, and the protected public route before attempting repair.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the LM Studio API server using the vendor CLI authority.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the reviewed LM Studio CLI server start path, then confirm local/public OpenAI-compatible /v1/models.
entries.rollbackNotes: If local recovery succeeds but the public route still fails, inspect Cloudflare tunnel state separately from LM Studio itself.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for the LM Studio API server.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Check TB2 status-runtime, verify prod and staging runtime state, and probe local/public health endpoints.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the TB2 Windows entrypoint scripts, the local MCP start authority, and the active cloudflared TB2 route mapping.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the TB2 Windows entrypoint layer. It intentionally keeps staging drift and public-route failures visible.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the reviewed TB2 local MCP start authority, then verify local/public health and runtime integrity.
entries.rollbackNotes: If local listener recovers but public health still fails, inspect cloudflared routing or runtime stage drift before treating TB2 as restored.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for the TB2 Windows entrypoint layer. It intentionally fails closed when staging or public health remain broken.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the reviewed ComfyUI local doctor to validate the portable runtime, model links, ComfyUI process, and localhost health endpoint.
entries.rollbackNotes: Doctor is read-only. If it fails, inspect the local ComfyUI runtime layout and existing repo-level service-control scripts before changing software or models.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only doctor action for the ComfyUI localhost-only static image runtime.

entries.inputContract: No user input. Run the reviewed ComfyUI localhost-only restart wrapper and wait for the governed 127.0.0.1:8188 runtime to recover.
entries.rollbackNotes: If restart does not restore localhost health, inspect the ComfyUI portable runtime console and repo-level start script before changing models or runtime flags.
entries.notes: Reviewed local-only ensure-running action for the ComfyUI localhost-only static image runtime.
